## We Say

Wait, what, a wax from Gyeon? That's right the coating giant has introduced a wax to their range featuring a fluorine based formula as found in their legendary Q2 Booster. Gyeon Q2 Wax comes in innovative packaging where the wax is contained in a tube, simply wind it to expose fresh wax and use the supplied applicator to apply to the paintwork. Similar to a roll-on deodorant. Perfect for those wishing to add a topper to their coating or as a stand alone protection product.

## Key Features

Beading*10*/10(Compared To Others)

Durability*2* Months(Average Value)

Slickness*8*/10(Compared To Others)

## Description

Gyeon Q2 Wax is a traditional car wax with a fluorine based formula. Expect high gloss, impressive water beading and easy application. The innovative packaging is similar to a roll-on deodorant in that you simply wind the wheel at the bottom to expose fresh wax. The included applicator is comfortable to use and is perfectly sized for the wax. Q2 Wax can be used as a stand alone protection product or as a topper for your coating.

## How To Use

As with all waxes, preparation is crucial to it's ease of application and durability. Ensure paintwork is clean, decontaminated and free of any greases or oily residues. Apply and even layer of Q2 Wax on the paintwork and allow it to cure for a minimum of 30 minutes before wiping off.
